## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors (`make build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] OpenAPI specs updated (if endpoints or events changed)
- [ ] OpenAPI specs validate (`make openapi-lint`)
